'''''Stormhawk''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]].

==History==
At some point prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the ''Stormhawk'' was [[Reconnaissance of mercenary base|seen]] undergoing weapons testing at the Imperial Academy at [[Carida/Legends|Carida]].<ref name="XwA" /> Some time after the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the ''Stormhawk'' was dispatched to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-controlled planet [[Saarn]] to conduct a 'strike-and-fade' mission. During this military operation, ''Stormhawk'' technicians set up a listening outpost and discovered the New Republic base on Saarn had minimal defences, prompting ''Stormhawk'' to deploy several [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] squads to capture the base.<ref name="The Trap article">{{JournalCite|6|The Trap (article)}}</ref>

===In Thrawn's armada===
It was a part of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] personal [[Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)|armada]] during Thrawn's campaign against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] some five years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] ([[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]). ''Stormhawk'' participated at the [[Battle of Sluis Van]] in a failed attempt to capture unoccupied New Republic vessels. It would later serve as back up for the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] during the assault on the [[Ukio system/Legends|Ukio system]], where it was tasked with launching a pair of [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruisers]] equipped with a functioning [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] that would serve as the key elements in the assault. ''Stormhawk'' last appeared at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].
